---
title: "Experiments"
description: "Hands-on physics experiments"
---

# Physics Experiments

Hands-on experiments demonstrating fundamental physics principles. Each experiment includes materials with specific quantities, step-by-step procedures, the underlying science, and context.

## Optics

- [Polarized Light and the Three-Polarizer Paradox](polarizers.qmd) - Two crossed polarizers block all light; adding a third lets some back through

## Electrostatics

- [Electric Pearl Chains](pearl-chains.qmd) - Steel ball bearings in castor oil spontaneously form chains aligned with a high-voltage electric field
